summary: Fun show remembered but ruined by very poor sound quality of the copy
review: The reviewer recalls the concerts as enjoyable, yet they cannot assess the performance because the recording is described as 'very poor' and essentially unlistenable. No musical details or standout moments are mentioned due to the bad audio.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief, 1‑star review focusing on terrible recording quality; no positive show information to raise the rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer calls the copy 'very poor sound quality' and says they cannot listen to it.
